goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'south'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
The train should 'leave after 16:00' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the south
Make sure you get attraction type and address
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to london liverpool street
The train should leave after 16:00 and should leave on sunday
Make sure you get price and train ID
